reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, en el viaje desde Corrientes a las cataratas, es un verdadero oasis en medio del camino

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service; on the trip from Corrientes to the falls, it's a true oasis along the way.

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención de los empleados en todo sentido, el lugar bien y las cosas carísimas

(Translated by Google)
Terrible customer service in every way, the place is nice but everything is extremely expensive.

reviews.comment:
Cordial atención, mercado con buena opción de distintos sanguches:  integral , triples miga jamón-queso y pollo-rúcula (exquisito) y  baños limpios

(Translated by Google)
Friendly service, market with a good selection of different sandwiches: whole wheat, triple crumb ham and cheese and chicken and arugula (exquisite) and clean bathrooms
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3dElhdHd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Lugar con dos baños para señoras. Cuando hay mucha gente la espera es interminable. Quiero expresar mi desconformidad por el precio del agua para el mate. $800 por un termo de un litro. Entiendo que debe cubrir el costo, pero es un monto excesivo. Reconsiderar el cobro de este
servicio por favor.

(Translated by Google)
This place has two restrooms for women. When it's busy, the wait is endless. I want to express my dissatisfaction with the price of hot water for mate. $800 for a one-liter thermos. I understand it needs to cover costs, but it's an excessive amount. Please reconsider charging for this service.

reviewReply.comment: Buenos días  gracias por las sugerencias estamos trabajando en los puntos para satisfacer todas las expectativas de nuestros clientes así mejorar su experiencia con nosotros lo esperamos nuevamente y lograr llegar a las 5 estrellas saludos

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VLeVBzcUhfNE5YSGNREAE

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) There are few food options, but if you're traveling and tired, it's a good place to stop and rest. The bathroom is reasonably clean, but there are no showers.

(Original)
Pouca opção de comida mas se você estiver viajando e cansado é um bom lugar pra fazer uma parada e descansar. O banheiro é razoavelmente limpo mas não há local para tomar banho.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VObmh0YlQzNU9Mc05BEAE

(Translated by Google)
SUPER FRIENDLY! LUCAS IN CHARGE OF THE SUPER PIOLA SHOP A PHENOMENON GREAT WORK GROUP ALL ALWAYS WILLING TO PROVIDE THE SERVICES THEY OFFER!!

reviews.comment:
Tiene baños limpios .y está en un lugar estrategico de la ruta nacional 12. En el tramo entre las ciudades de Posadas y Corrientes. Se puede comprar algun alimento. Hay agua caliente para mate

(Translated by Google)
It has clean bathrooms and is strategically located on National Route 12, between the cities of Posadas and Corrientes. You can buy some food. There's hot water for mate.

reviews.comment:
¡Excelente atención de todo el personal! Sobre todo de Lucas (quien atiende el shop)
Tuvimos un problema mecánico con el auto, quedando varadas toda la tarde y nos ayudó a solucionar el inconveniente y gestionar la vuelta!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from all the staff! Especially Lucas (who works in the shop). We had a mechanical problem with our car, leaving us stranded all afternoon, and he helped us solve the problem and arrange our return!

reviews.comment:
Excelente la atención que brindan.
Los sanitarios siempre están muy limpios y es un punto importante para destacar
Un lugar de paso muy agradable.
¡Felicitaciones!

The service they provide is excellent.
The restrooms are always very clean, which is a key point to highlight.
A very pleasant stopover.
Congratulations!

reviews.comment:

Excellent service, I would highlight the cleanliness of the restrooms and the good signage on the beach.
